nodes.label: CPU geomean ≤ 1.65x vanilla gate threshold
nodes.rationale: Achieved 1.496; CI measured 1.515 headless / 1.507 xvfb-windowed — paired ratio transfers; tighten only after 5 consecutive green nights

nodes.label: First-paint ≤ 2.30x CI regression gate
nodes.rationale: virtualized displays measure fp in a different regime than the ledger's real display; CI observed ~1.97x headless/xvfb-windowed vs ledger's windowed real-display 0.86x; gate defends against regressions in CI's own band, not the published headline

nodes.label: V1-API-FREEZE.md — Spark v1 API freeze review (M4.1)
nodes.norm_label: v1-api-freeze.md — spark v1 api freeze review (m4.1)

nodes.label: Spark 1.x semver policy (stable/experimental/internal)
nodes.rationale: stable = supported for life of 1.x; experimental may change in a 1.x minor if documented; internal (e.g. __spark* DOM props) is never API even when siblings read it; 15.0 KB gzip budget frozen for life of 1.x

nodes.label: spark-ssr stable conventions (filesystem routing, spark-ssr blocks, auto CRUD)
nodes.norm_label: spark-ssr stable conventions (filesystem routing, spark-ssr blocks, auto crud)

nodes.label: spark-ssr experimental surfaces (Jobs, OpenAPI+typed client, auto= synthesis, config.fonts/images)
nodes.norm_label: spark-ssr experimental surfaces (jobs, openapi+typed client, auto= synthesis, config.fonts/images)

nodes.label: Companion packages peerDependencies >=1.0.0 <2 flip
nodes.rationale: packaging change at 1.0 moving companions off hard dependency ranges onto peerDependencies; happens at 1.0 because it's breaking-ish (§5.4)

nodes.label: spark-ssr package — full-stack SSR on Bun
nodes.norm_label: spark-ssr package — full-stack ssr on bun

nodes.label: Keyed reconciliation via LIS trim-first diff
nodes.rationale: trims unchanged prefix/suffix, runs longest-increasing-subsequence on the rest so a swap is 2 DOM moves not 997; rows created 64 at a time from a cloned stamped recipe; document-level event delegation avoids per-row listeners/closures
nodes.norm_label: keyed reconciliation via lis trim-first diff

nodes.label: Template-level dependency dispatch mechanism
nodes.rationale: observed dependency graph sends a changed key straight to affected bindings; selection-shaped bindings patch exactly the row losing and gaining the value

nodes.label: Runtime idle self-warmup mechanism
nodes.rationale: after mount, at browser idle, spark exercises its own row pipeline against a detached template so the first real interaction runs JIT-warm; runs against actual live templates in the user's actual browser, unlike a build-time framework

nodes.label: Speed program 4 (spark-html 1.6.0) — definitive run
nodes.rationale: levers G1 terser two-pass, G2 in-row whitespace drop, G3 moveBefore reorders, G4 row-pass shortcut, G5 positional stamp recipes, N4 single-root span unbox; CPU geomean 1.239x (was 1.286 at 1.5.0); run memory 1.95x -> 1.45x; gzip 18,427 -> 18,344/18,432

nodes.label: speed-max-pro program complete (spark-html 1.5.0)
nodes.rationale: CPU geomean 1.286x, closed at pre-registered SHIP target <=1.30; stretch target <=1.20 not reached — residual is clone+stamp+layout physics plus interpretive floor of no-build identity

nodes.label: speed-max-pro CHECKPOINT (spark-html 1.4.0)
nodes.rationale: P1 table-structural row templates drop inert whitespace, P2 keyed-equality selector index, P3 idle self-warmup; CPU geomean 1.313x; statistically ties Vue (1.31), program continues

nodes.label: FINAL speed-max program complete (spark-html 1.2.0, the dispatch release)
nodes.rationale: template-dependency column dispatch, trim-first reconcile, document-level event delegation, chunked 64-row creates; CPU geomean 1.496x; fp headline 0.86x later retired as single-sample noise
nodes.norm_label: final speed-max program complete (spark-html 1.2.0, the dispatch release)

nodes.label: Speed program 1 complete (spark-html 1.1.0)
nodes.rationale: CPU geomean 1.53x, between Angular (1.45) and React Hooks (1.61); fixed select/swap/remove single-row outliers

nodes.label: First-paint metric display-regime-dependence finding
nodes.rationale: single-sample noisy metric, spread 0.92-1.61x across six same-night paired windowed samples; 0.86x headline retired; now defended via A/B against prior release in stable headless regime plus CI-band tripwire

nodes.label: spark-ssr auth table password hashing on write
nodes.rationale: a plain create on the auth table IS sign-up; passwords hash on the way in automatically
nodes.norm_label: spark-ssr auth table password hashing on write

nodes.label: Ambient query param ?q= dual server/client binding
nodes.rationale: {q} is ambient: filters SERVER render via ?q=, and the bind live-filters on the client — one expression, both worlds; params stay bound, never string-interpolate ORDER BY
nodes.norm_label: ambient query param ?q= dual server/client binding

nodes.label: Build pipeline auto-injects manifest link/theme-color/SW registration
nodes.rationale: nothing app-specific to write for offline-first PWA behavior
nodes.norm_label: build pipeline auto-injects manifest link/theme-color/sw registration

nodes.label: sockets() — boots every <template ws> on the page
nodes.norm_label: sockets() — boots every <template ws> on the page

nodes.label: Separate component to avoid disabling spark-ssr's [param] auto-404 (else-branch scan)
nodes.norm_label: separate component to avoid disabling spark-ssr's [param] auto-404 (else-branch scan)

nodes.norm_label: loggedin prop as explicit yes/no string (empty-string-truthy footgun, bugs.md #5)

nodes.label: Search form uses full page reload, not navigate() (scope isolation + non-hydrating cache eligibility)
nodes.norm_label: search form uses full page reload, not navigate() (scope isolation + non-hydrating cache eligibility)

nodes.norm_label: color/initial precomputed in sql since script can't see props during ssr

nodes.norm_label: viewport-fit=cover set via app.js dom mutation, not a duplicate meta tag (spark-ssr always emits its own unconditional viewport meta)

nodes.norm_label: auto-reply deliberately client-side, not a background job (session-scoped table write requires req.session; job has none) — see post-v1-bugs.md

nodes.label: bugs.md #5: empty-string prop value coerced to boolean true on non-hydrating kept import host
nodes.norm_label: bugs.md #5: empty-string prop value coerced to boolean true on non-hydrating kept import host

nodes.label: No-build, no-compiler, no-virtual-DOM positioning
nodes.rationale: Deliberate scope: targets sites needing interactivity without a compiler's complexity ceiling; audience is people who love hand-writing HTML in an AI-generated web.

nodes.label: In-place DOM patching / reconciliation (no virtual DOM)
nodes.norm_label: in-place dom patching / reconciliation (no virtual dom)

nodes.label: Dependency-tracked precision updates (row-level, not full re-render)
nodes.norm_label: dependency-tracked precision updates (row-level, not full re-render)

nodes.label: krausest js-framework-benchmark results, spark-html 1.6.0 (CPU geomean 1.239x)
nodes.rationale: Measured, not claimed; paired local run vs vanillajs reference impl; past Vue (1.31) and Angular (1.45) on the solidjs.com reference scale; run-memory dropped 1.95x -> 1.45x same release; upstream PR #2048 still open; first-paint 0.86x headline retired for noise.

nodes.label: Named stores + derived() read-only computed stores
nodes.norm_label: named stores + derived() read-only computed stores

nodes.label: Dev diagnostics layer (spark-html-devtools, unknown directive/hydration mismatch warnings)
nodes.norm_label: dev diagnostics layer (spark-html-devtools, unknown directive/hydration mismatch warnings)

nodes.label: spark-ssr: the template is the backend
nodes.norm_label: spark-ssr: the template is the backend

nodes.label: spark-ssr: template infers schema/REST/auth/hydration
nodes.rationale: Every other full-stack framework asks you to describe the app twice (UI + models/resolvers); spark-ssr derives the rest from the one template you already wrote.

nodes.norm_label: four data-source shapes: sql, url fetch, markdown glob, js module
